requirement_topic.en: EVSE Safety Standard — IEC 61851-1 vs GB/T 18487.1-2023

summary.en: Brunei's electrical installation framework, administered by the Department of Electrical Services (DES), is aligned with IEC standards. For EV supply equipment, IEC 61851-1:2017 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements) is the applicable international baseline covering control pilot behaviour, protective earthing, isolation monitoring, interlocks, overcurrent protection, over-temperature protection, and emergency stop provisions where applicable. No confirmed Brunei-published EV-charger-specific safety regulation has been identified as of 2026-06; however, IEC 61851-1 compliance is the expected DES-aligned safety framework for EVSE in Brunei. DES coordinates electrical installation approval and may require IEC-family safety evidence before accepting an EVSE installation.
summary.zh: 文莱由电气服务部（DES）管理的电气安装框架与IEC标准体系一致。对于电动汽车供电设备，IEC 61851-1:2017（电动汽车传导充电系统第1部分：通用要求）是适用的国际基线，涵盖控制导引、保护接地、绝缘监测、互锁、过流保护、过温保护及适用时的急停措施。截至2026年6月，未发现文莱专门发布的电动汽车充电桩安全法规；但IEC 61851-1合规性是文莱EVSE预期的DES体系安全框架。DES负责协调电气安装审批，在接受EVSE安装前可能要求提供IEC体系安全证据。
summary.zht: 汶萊由電氣服務部（DES）管理的電氣安裝框架與IEC標準體系一致。對於電動汽車供電設備，IEC 61851-1:2017（電動汽車傳導充電系統第1部分：通用要求）是適用的國際基線，涵蓋控制導引、保護接地、絕緣監測、互鎖、過流保護、過溫保護及適用時的急停措施。截至2026年6月，未發現汶萊專門發布的電動汽車充電樁安全法規；但IEC 61851-1合規性是汶萊EVSE預期的DES體系安全框架。DES負責協調電氣安裝審批，在接受EVSE安裝前可能要求提供IEC體系安全證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-21-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 21-1: EMC requirements for conductive connection to AC/DC supply
Department of Electrical Services (DES), Ministry of Development, Brunei — electrical installation approval authority
Brunei Electricity Order (Cap. 165)

summary.en: China's comparable safety baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements, in force April 2024), structurally corresponding to IEC 61851-1 but incorporating China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. GB/T 18487.1-2023 test evidence is a useful design reference but does not substitute for IEC 61851-1 accredited test reports required by DES or a Brunei conformity assessment route.
summary.zh: 中国可比安全基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023（电动汽车传导充电系统第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号及通信要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试证据可作为有用的设计参考，但不能替代DES或文莱合格评定路径所要求的IEC 61851-1认可测试报告。
summary.zht: 中國可比安全基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號及通訊要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試證據可作為有用的設計參考，但不能替代DES或汶萊合格評定路徑所要求的IEC 61851-1認可測試報告。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (in force April 2024)

gap.en: Exporters should prepare: (1) an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix mapping GB/T 18487.1-2023 design to IEC 61851-1 requirements; (2) accredited IEC 61851-1 safety test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory; (3) protective device ratings and earthing design documentation; (4) installation instructions aligned with DES requirements; (5) tropical climate derating review (see evbn-safety-3). A standalone GB/T 18487 test report is not accepted as IEC 61851-1 compliance evidence without a clause-level gap assessment and IEC-accredited testing.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备：(1) IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵，将GB/T 18487.1-2023设计映射至IEC 61851-1要求；(2) ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC 61851-1安全测试报告；(3) 保护器件额定值和接地设计文件；(4) 符合DES要求的安装说明；(5) 热带气候降额审查（见evbn-safety-3）。单独的GB/T 18487测试报告在未完成逐条差距评估和IEC认可测试的情况下，不被视为IEC 61851-1合规证据。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備：(1) IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣，將GB/T 18487.1-2023設計映射至IEC 61851-1要求；(2) ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC 61851-1安全測試報告；(3) 保護器件額定值和接地設計文件；(4) 符合DES要求的安裝說明；(5) 熱帶氣候降額審查（見evbn-safety-3）。單獨的GB/T 18487測試報告在未完成逐條差距評估和IEC認可測試的情況下，不被視為IEC 61851-1合規證據。

mandatory_status.target: IEC 61851-1 is the expected compliance framework for EVSE in Brunei aligned with DES; no confirmed dedicated mandatory Brunei EV-charger safety regulation published as of 2026-06; DES coordination required
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487.1-2023 applies to China domestic design and certification; not accepted as direct IEC 61851-1 evidence in Brunei without additional IEC-accredited testing

source.publisher: Department of Electrical Services (DES), Ministry of Development, Brunei Darussalam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only for Brunei-facing EVSE. DES coordination for installation approval and IEC 61851-1 accredited safety evidence from an ILAC-recognised laboratory are required. Tropical climate thermal and humidity ratings must also be addressed.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于面向文莱的EVSE，应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。须与DES协调安装审批，并提供ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC 61851-1认可安全证据。同时须处理热带气候热额定值和湿度防护等级要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於面向汶萊的EVSE，應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。須與DES協調安裝審批，並提供ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC 61851-1認可安全證據。同時須處理熱帶氣候熱額定值和濕度防護等級要求。

requirement_topic.en: DC EVSE Safety — IEC 61851-23 vs GB/T 18487.2

summary.en: For DC EV supply equipment in Brunei, IEC 61851-23:2023 (second edition, Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment) is the applicable international safety standard. IEC 61851-23 covers DC fast charger station requirements including isolation and protection, DC output monitoring, interlock and communication verification, earthing, and safety provisions specific to high-power DC output. Brunei's IEC-aligned framework is expected to require IEC 61851-23 accredited evidence for DC EVSE installations. No confirmed Brunei-specific published DC EVSE safety regulation has been identified as of 2026-06.
summary.zh: 文莱直流电动汽车供电设备适用的国际安全标准为IEC 61851-23:2023（第二版，电动汽车传导充电系统第23部分：直流电动汽车供电设备）。IEC 61851-23涵盖直流快充站要求，包括隔离和保护、直流输出监测、互锁和通信验证、接地，以及高功率直流输出特有的安全条款。文莱IEC体系框架预期对直流EVSE安装要求IEC 61851-23认可证据。截至2026年6月，未发现文莱专门发布的直流EVSE安全法规。
summary.zht: 汶萊直流電動汽車供電設備適用的國際安全標準為IEC 61851-23:2023（第二版，電動汽車傳導充電系統第23部分：直流電動汽車供電設備）。IEC 61851-23涵蓋直流快充站要求，包括隔離和保護、直流輸出監測、互鎖和通訊驗證、接地，以及高功率直流輸出特有的安全條款。汶萊IEC體系框架預期對直流EVSE安裝要求IEC 61851-23認可證據。截至2026年6月，未發現汶萊專門發布的直流EVSE安全法規。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment (second edition)
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
Department of Electrical Services (DES) — installation approval authority for DC charger installations in Brunei

summary.en: China's DC EV supply equipment safety standard is GB/T 18487.2, which covers DC off-board charger requirements. GB/T 18487.2 test evidence is structured for China domestic DC charging systems using GB/T 27930 CAN communication and GB/T 20234.3 connectors, both of which differ from the IEC 61851-23 / IEC 61851-24 / CCS2 stack expected in Brunei. GB/T 18487.2 test reports are not a substitute for IEC 61851-23 accredited evidence without a clause-level gap assessment.
summary.zh: 中国直流电动汽车供电设备安全标准为GB/T 18487.2，涵盖非车载直流充电机要求。GB/T 18487.2测试证据针对采用GB/T 27930 CAN通信和GB/T 20234.3接口的中国国内直流充电系统，与文莱预期的IEC 61851-23 / IEC 61851-24 / CCS2技术栈不同。在未完成逐条差距评估的情况下，GB/T 18487.2测试报告不能替代IEC 61851-23认可证据。
summary.zht: 中國直流電動汽車供電設備安全標準為GB/T 18487.2，涵蓋非車載直流充電機要求。GB/T 18487.2測試證據針對採用GB/T 27930 CAN通訊和GB/T 20234.3接口的中國國內直流充電系統，與汶萊預期的IEC 61851-23 / IEC 61851-24 / CCS2技術棧不同。在未完成逐條差距評估的情況下，GB/T 18487.2測試報告不能替代IEC 61851-23認可證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.2 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 2: General requirements for off-board conductive chargers

gap.en: DC EVSE exporters to Brunei must provide IEC 61851-23:2023 accredited test evidence from an ILAC-recognised laboratory, in addition to IEC 61851-1 evidence. GB/T 18487.2 test reports do not substitute without a clause-level gap analysis. DC charger firmware and communication must use IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 (not GB/T 27930 CAN) for CCS2 vehicle communication. DES coordination is required before installation.
gap.zh: 向文莱出口直流EVSE须提供ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC 61851-23:2023认可测试证据，以及IEC 61851-1证据。GB/T 18487.2测试报告须经逐条差距分析方可参考，不能直接替代。直流充电桩固件和通信须采用IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118（而非GB/T 27930 CAN）用于CCS2车辆通信。安装前须与DES协调。
gap.zht: 向汶萊出口直流EVSE須提供ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC 61851-23:2023認可測試證據，以及IEC 61851-1證據。GB/T 18487.2測試報告須經逐條差距分析方可參考，不能直接替代。直流充電樁固件和通訊須採用IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118（而非GB/T 27930 CAN）用於CCS2車輛通訊。安裝前須與DES協調。

mandatory_status.target: IEC 61851-23 is the expected DC EVSE safety framework in Brunei; no confirmed dedicated mandatory Brunei DC EVSE regulation published as of 2026-06; DES coordination required
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487.2 applies to China domestic DC charger design; it is not accepted as IEC 61851-23 evidence in Brunei without additional IEC-accredited testing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DC EVSE for Brunei requires IEC 61851-23:2023 accredited evidence, IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication for CCS2, and DES coordination. GB/T 18487.2 test reports are not a direct substitute. Engage an ILAC-accredited laboratory for IEC 61851-23 testing before shipping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向文莱的直流EVSE须提供IEC 61851-23:2023认可证据，CCS2通信采用IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118，并与DES协调。GB/T 18487.2测试报告不能直接替代。发货前须委托ILAC认可实验室进行IEC 61851-23测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向汶萊的直流EVSE須提供IEC 61851-23:2023認可證據，CCS2通訊採用IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118，並與DES協調。GB/T 18487.2測試報告不能直接替代。發貨前須委託ILAC認可實驗室進行IEC 61851-23測試。

requirement_topic.en: Tropical Environment / Humidity Derating — IP Rating and Climate Design for Brunei
requirement_topic.zh: 热带环境/湿度降额——文莱IP防护等级与气候设计
requirement_topic.zht: 熱帶環境/濕度降額——汶萊IP防護等級與氣候設計

summary.en: Brunei has a tropical equatorial climate with year-round temperatures of approximately 27–32°C and high relative humidity (often exceeding 80%). Outdoor EV chargers in Brunei must be rated for sustained tropical operating conditions including UV exposure, condensation, biological fouling, and thermal stress cycling. The applicable ingress protection standard is IEC 60529. IP54 (dust-protected, splash-proof from all directions) is the practical minimum for outdoor EVSE enclosures in Brunei's tropical environment; IP55 or IP65 is preferred for public-facing outdoor units. No confirmed Brunei-specific IP rating mandate for EVSE has been published as of 2026-06, but tropical climate design is an engineering requirement for reliable outdoor deployment.
summary.zh: 文莱为热带赤道气候，全年气温约27-32°C，相对湿度高（常超80%）。文莱室外电动汽车充电桩须适用于持续热带运行条件，包括紫外线照射、冷凝、生物污染及热循环应力。适用的防护等级标准为IEC 60529。IP54（防尘、全向防溅）是文莱热带环境下室外EVSE外壳的实际最低要求；面向公众的室外设备优选IP55或IP65。截至2026年6月，未发现文莱专门发布EVSE IP防护等级强制要求，但热带气候设计是可靠室外部署的工程需求。
summary.zht: 汶萊為熱帶赤道氣候，全年氣溫約27-32°C，相對濕度高（常超80%）。汶萊室外電動汽車充電樁須適用於持續熱帶運行條件，包括紫外線照射、冷凝、生物污染及熱循環應力。適用的防護等級標準為IEC 60529。IP54（防塵、全向防濺）是汶萊熱帶環境下室外EVSE外殼的實際最低要求；面向公眾的室外設備優選IP55或IP65。截至2026年6月，未發現汶萊專門發布EVSE IP防護等級強制要求，但熱帶氣候設計是可靠室外部署的工程需求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code) — IP54 minimum recommended for outdoor tropical EVSE
IEC 60068 — Environmental testing (temperature, humidity, UV exposure)
Department of Electrical Services (DES) — electrical installation approval; climate adequacy is an engineering requirement reviewed during approval

summary.en: China's IP rating standard equivalent is GB/T 4208, which corresponds to IEC 60529. China-market outdoor charger designs may specify IP54 or IP55, but the Brunei tropical climate (year-round high humidity, biological growth risk) imposes different sustained environmental stress than most of mainland China's climate zones. Thermal design must also address Brunei's consistently high ambient temperatures without the benefit of cold seasons available in most of China.
summary.zh: 中国IP防护等级等效标准为GB/T 4208，对应IEC 60529。中国市场室外充电桩设计可能采用IP54或IP55，但文莱热带气候（全年高湿度、生物生长风险）与中国大部分气候区的持续环境应力不同。热设计还须应对文莱持续高温环境，中国大部分地区有寒冷季节可供热缓解，而文莱没有。
summary.zht: 中國IP防護等級等效標準為GB/T 4208，對應IEC 60529。中國市場室外充電樁設計可能採用IP54或IP55，但汶萊熱帶氣候（全年高濕度、生物生長風險）與中國大部分氣候區的持續環境應力不同。熱設計還須應對汶萊持續高溫環境，中國大部分地區有寒冷季節可供熱緩解，而汶萊沒有。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 4208 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (equivalent to IEC 60529)
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — includes environmental design provisions for China climate conditions

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) outdoor EVSE enclosures are rated to IP54 minimum (IP65 recommended) per IEC 60529 with test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (2) thermal design is validated for Brunei's sustained tropical ambient (27–32°C, high humidity year-round) — not a single worst-case temperature but sustained operation without seasonal relief; (3) UV-resistant materials are specified for all external plastics; (4) corrosion-resistant materials and finishes are used for all external metalwork in Brunei's humid tropical environment; (5) biological fouling provisions (insects, mould) are considered for outdoor ventilation and cable entry points.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 室外EVSE外壳按IEC 60529达到最低IP54（推荐IP65），并持有ILAC认可实验室测试证书；(2) 热设计针对文莱持续热带环境（全年27-32°C，高湿度）进行验证——不是单次最差温度，而是无季节性缓解的持续运行；(3) 所有外部塑料件采用耐UV材料；(4) 文莱潮湿热带环境下所有外部金属件采用耐腐蚀材料和表面处理；(5) 室外通风口和电缆入口须考虑生物污染（昆虫、霉菌）防护措施。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 室外EVSE外殼按IEC 60529達到最低IP54（推薦IP65），並持有ILAC認可實驗室測試證書；(2) 熱設計針對汶萊持續熱帶環境（全年27-32°C，高濕度）進行驗證——不是單次最差溫度，而是無季節性緩解的持續運行；(3) 所有外部塑料件採用耐UV材料；(4) 汶萊潮濕熱帶環境下所有外部金屬件採用耐腐蝕材料和表面處理；(5) 室外通風口和電纜入口須考慮生物污染（昆蟲、霉菌）防護措施。

mandatory_status.target: No confirmed mandatory Brunei EVSE IP rating regulation published as of 2026-06; IP54 minimum is an engineering requirement for reliable tropical outdoor EVSE operation; DES may assess climate adequacy during installation approval
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 4208 (IEC 60529 equivalent) applies to China domestic IP rating testing; tropical climate validation for Brunei conditions requires separate engineering review

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Brunei's tropical climate (27–32°C, high humidity year-round) imposes sustained environmental stress on outdoor EVSE that differs from most China domestic design conditions. IP54 minimum (IP65 recommended for public units) per IEC 60529, UV-resistant materials, and corrosion-resistant construction are all engineering requirements for reliable outdoor deployment. Confirm IEC 60529 test certificates with the DES installation approval package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 文莱热带气候（全年27-32°C，高湿度）对室外EVSE造成的持续环境应力与中国国内大多数设计条件不同。根据IEC 60529，最低IP54（公共设备推荐IP65）、耐UV材料和耐腐蚀结构均为可靠室外部署的工程要求。IEC 60529测试证书须随DES安装审批文件一并提供。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 汶萊熱帶氣候（全年27-32°C，高濕度）對室外EVSE造成的持續環境應力與中國國內大多數設計條件不同。根據IEC 60529，最低IP54（公共設備推薦IP65）、耐UV材料和耐腐蝕結構均為可靠室外部署的工程要求。IEC 60529測試證書須隨DES安裝審批文件一併提供。

requirement_topic.en: Electrical Installation Approval — DES Coordination (No Confirmed EV-Charging Code as of 2026-06)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安装审批——DES协调（截至2026年6月无已确认电动汽车充电规程）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安裝審批——DES協調（截至2026年6月無已確認電動汽車充電規程）

summary.en: The Department of Electrical Services (DES), Ministry of Development, Brunei Darussalam, is the statutory authority for electrical installation licensing, inspection, and approval in Brunei under the Electricity Order (Cap. 165). All grid-connected electrical installations in Brunei, including EV charging equipment, must be installed by DES-licensed electrical contractors and are subject to DES inspection and approval. No dedicated published EV-charger installation code or grid-connection regulation specific to EVSE has been confirmed in Brunei as of 2026-06; however, the general electrical installation approval process under DES applies. Exporters and project owners must engage a DES-licensed electrical contractor in Brunei to navigate the approval process.
summary.zh: 文莱达鲁萨兰国发展部电气服务部（DES）是根据《电力法令》（第165章）负责文莱电气安装许可、检查和审批的法定机构。文莱所有并网电气安装（包括电动汽车充电设备）须由DES持牌电气承包商安装，并经DES检查和审批。截至2026年6月，未发现文莱专门发布针对EVSE的电动汽车充电桩安装规程或并网法规；但DES的通用电气安装审批程序适用。出口商和项目业主须在文莱委托DES持牌电气承包商以完成审批流程。
summary.zht: 汶萊達魯薩蘭國發展部電氣服務部（DES）是根據《電力法令》（第165章）負責汶萊電氣安裝許可、檢查和審批的法定機構。汶萊所有併網電氣安裝（包括電動汽車充電設備）須由DES持牌電氣承包商安裝，並經DES檢查和審批。截至2026年6月，未發現汶萊專門發布針對EVSE的電動汽車充電樁安裝規程或併網法規；但DES的通用電氣安裝審批程序適用。出口商和項目業主須在汶萊委託DES持牌電氣承包商以完成審批程序。

standards_or_laws: Electricity Order (Cap. 165), Brunei Darussalam — framework for electrical installation licensing and approval
Department of Electrical Services (DES), Ministry of Development, Brunei — statutory authority for electrical installation approval
IEC 60364 — Electrical installations of buildings (IEC baseline likely referenced by DES)

summary.en: China's analogous electrical installation standard for EV charging is NB/T 33008 (Electric vehicle charging station general requirements) and related grid-operator project-acceptance requirements. NB/T 33008 compliance and China grid-operator acceptance are not recognised by DES and do not fulfil Brunei electrical installation approval requirements. A Brunei-facing project requires DES coordination via a locally licensed electrical contractor regardless of the China domestic approval status of the product.
summary.zh: 中国类似的电动汽车充电电气安装标准为NB/T 33008（电动汽车充电站通用要求）及相关电网运营商项目验收要求。NB/T 33008合规性和中国电网运营商验收不被DES认可，不满足文莱电气安装审批要求。无论产品的中国国内审批状态如何，面向文莱的项目均须通过当地持牌电气承包商与DES协调。
summary.zht: 中國類似的電動汽車充電電氣安裝標準為NB/T 33008（電動汽車充電站通用要求）及相關電網運營商項目驗收要求。NB/T 33008合規性和中國電網運營商驗收不被DES認可，不滿足汶萊電氣安裝審批要求。無論產品的中國國內審批狀態如何，面向汶萊的項目均須通過當地持牌電氣承包商與DES協調。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 33008 — Electric vehicle charging station general requirements (China domestic standard)
China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters and project developers must: (1) engage a DES-licensed electrical contractor in Brunei as a mandatory first step; (2) prepare single-line diagrams, load calculations, supply capacity confirmation, earthing design, and metering documentation for DES submission; (3) confirm with DES whether any EV-charger-specific installation code or grid-connection regulation has been published since 2026-06; (4) not assume China NB/T 33008 or grid-operator documentation satisfies DES requirements; (5) plan sufficient lead time for DES inspection, approval, and commissioning before project activation.
gap.zh: 出口商和项目开发商须：(1) 委托文莱DES持牌电气承包商作为强制性第一步；(2) 准备单线图、负荷计算、供电容量确认、接地设计和计量文件，用于DES申报；(3) 向DES确认2026年6月后是否已发布任何电动汽车充电桩专项安装规程或并网法规；(4) 不得假设中国NB/T 33008或电网运营商文件满足DES要求；(5) 在项目投入使用前为DES检查、审批和调试预留足够时间。
gap.zht: 出口商和項目開發商須：(1) 委託汶萊DES持牌電氣承包商作為強制性第一步；(2) 準備單線圖、負荷計算、供電容量確認、接地設計和計量文件，用於DES申報；(3) 向DES確認2026年6月後是否已發布任何電動汽車充電樁專項安裝規程或併網法規；(4) 不得假設中國NB/T 33008或電網運營商文件滿足DES要求；(5) 在項目投入使用前為DES檢查、審批和調試預留足夠時間。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — DES approval is required for all grid-connected electrical installations in Brunei; no confirmed dedicated EV-charger installation code published as of 2026-06; DES-licensed electrical contractor engagement is mandatory
mandatory_status.cn: China NB/T 33008 and grid-operator acceptance apply domestically only; not recognised by DES as Brunei installation approval

source.publisher: Department of Electrical Services (DES), Ministry of Development, Brunei Darussalam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DES approval via a locally licensed electrical contractor is mandatory for all grid-connected EV charger installations in Brunei. No dedicated published EV-charger installation code was confirmed as of 2026-06-14. Engage DES early to determine current requirements and allow adequate lead time for inspection and approval before project activation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 文莱所有并网电动汽车充电桩安装须通过当地持牌电气承包商取得DES审批，此为强制性要求。截至2026年6月14日，未确认专门发布的电动汽车充电桩安装规程。应尽早与DES协调，确认现行要求，并在项目投入使用前为检查和审批预留足够时间。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 汶萊所有併網電動汽車充電樁安裝須通過當地持牌電氣承包商取得DES審批，此為強制性要求。截至2026年6月14日，未確認專門發布的電動汽車充電樁安裝規程。應盡早與DES協調，確認現行要求，並在項目投入使用前為檢查和審批預留足夠時間。
